title: Nine Hammers
description: 9 VO2/Threshold intervals — the legendary Sufferfest workout

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 70%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/9. 70% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0 minutes of work done. 53 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First block at 100%. This is race pace. If you can't hold this, you can't race. Simple.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 1: 100% FTP for 4:30. 85-90 rpm, Seated. This should feel 'comfortably hard.'
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 1/9. 4:30 at 100%. You're building the engine that wins races.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/9. 4:30 in the space between 'fine' and 'please make it stop.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting: 100% for 4:30. Settle in. You can hold this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 1:30 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/9. 55% FTP, Seated. 1:30. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 90-90 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is harder than the last one. That's the point. Rep 2/9.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 2/9. 118% FTP. Relax upper body, drive through hips. Don't let cadence collapse.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/9. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/9. Fun fact: this is the exact power output where regret lives.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 25% into session. 118% at 95-100 rpm. Stay sharp on technique.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 1:30 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 29% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 90-90 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 19 minutes of work done. 43 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 90-90 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 3/9. 20 minutes in. Your mind wants to negotiate. Don't.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 32% through session. Rep 3/9. You've done 7min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 3/9. You're building something real here. 6 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 3/9. The suffering is progressive, like a tax bracket.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 3: 115% for 3:30. Execute each rep with precision.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 2:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 3/9. 55% FTP, Seated. 2:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 2:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 37% into session. 55%, 90-90 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 40% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 33 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 26 minutes in. 100% at 85-90 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 40% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 5 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 40% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 40% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 100%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 55% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 15min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 48% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 48% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 50% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: VO2max interval. Breathing should be gasping. After this: 1min 30s recovery before next effort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 50% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 50% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 50% done. 118% for 3:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 1:30 at 55%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 90-90 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 90-90 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 55% for 1:30. Then 27min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 27 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 57% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This one: 115% for 3:00. Next up: 2:00 recovery, then 3min at 100%.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 57% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 57% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 57% done. 115% for 3:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 62% done. 0 intervals left. 22 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 90-90 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 39 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 2:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 65% complete. Block 7/9. This is where you prove you're serious.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 65% through session. Block 7/9. You've done 21min of threshold work.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 41 minutes of quality work done. This is where champions separate from the pack.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Only 19 more minutes of this very special kind of suffering. Define 'only.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 7/9. Comfortably hard. Breathe deep. Trust the process.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 44 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 70% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 90-90 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 44 minutes of work done. 17 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 70% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 1:30. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 1 reps left. 14 minutes total. Your competition quit 10 minutes ago.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 72% through session. Rep 8/9. You've done 24min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've done 24 minutes of hard work. You can do 1 more intervals. Believe it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 72% done. Your legs are questioning your life choices. Tell them to shut up.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 46 minutes in. 118% FTP, 95-100 rpm. This builds your race-winning power.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 77% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 27min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 77% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 77% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 77% into session. 55%, 90-90 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final rep. 3:00 at 118%. Empty the tank. You've got 10 minutes of cooldown coming.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last rep. 110-118% FTP, 95-100 rpm. Seated. Finish strong, then 10 minutes easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This one is harder than the last. That's exactly how it should be. You're adapting. You're improving.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final rep. Your FTP is filing for protective custody. Ignore it. 3:00 and done.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last rep. 110-118% FTP, 95-100 rpm, Seated. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 84% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 84% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 53 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
